rules.message: MCP handles must be hex strings to avoid JavaScript 2^53 precision loss.
MCP handles are per connection; stale or cross-connection handles are invalid.
Tools that operate on handles must take handle as the first parameter.
Permission-gated MCP calls should map missing permissions to -32001.
Invalid MCP handles should map to -32002.
Scan tools must expose caps/truncation behavior and safe filters such as heap_only or string_module.
